Contact

Professional Contact

For conversations about Azure platform architecture, landing zones, sovereign and regulated cloud environments, Azure Virtual Desktop, enterprise networking or infrastructure as code, please contact me through LinkedIn.

Technical Profile

My public technical profile and repositories are available on GitHub.

This site documents architecture perspectives and technical implementation notes; it is not a channel for sharing confidential project or customer information.

For an overview of the blog focus, see the author profile and topic index.

Follow Azure architecture notes

Follow new Azure architecture notes via RSS or connect with me on LinkedIn. Public technical work is also available on GitHub.
